title: The True Cost of DIY Trucking: Unveiling Hidden Surcharges for Fuel, Helpers, and Gate Entry Fees
excerpt: True cost DIY trucking: hidden surcharges fuel helpers gate entry fees, versus professional movers Addis Ababa honest moving budget guide.
content:
The true cost of DIY trucking: unveiling hidden surcharges for fuel, helpers, and gate entry fees

DIY trucking headline daily rate seduces—then fuel, hired helpers, compound gate entry fees, standby traffic, damaged fridge, and your Sunday vanish into true cost exceeding professional quote you rejected as "expensive." Unveil surcharges before keys rental agency.

This guide totals true DIY trucking cost in Addis moving context.

Surcharge line items

  • Fuel: Round trip cross-city multiply; empty return leg.
  • Helpers: Per person day cash often unquoted upfront.
  • Gate fees: Compound commercial entry truck plate register tip.
  • Equipment: Dollies straps blankets rental per piece.
  • Standby: Elevator wait traffic billed hourly open-ended.
  • Damage: Uninsured repair full replacement.
  • Opportunity cost: Your salary days packing.

Spreadsheet model

Rental plus fuel plus helpers plus gate plus equipment plus eight hours your rate plus damage risk average—compare professional all-inclusive survey quote.

When DIY honest OK

Single couch ground floor friend truck one hour—accept risk.

Professional contrast

Active Movers line-item inclusions exclusions—no gate fee surprise if surveyed compound disclosed.

Conclusion

DIY true cost includes fuel helpers gate fees standby damage time—unveil before rental sign; professional move often net cheaper and insured.
author: Active Movers Team
